overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk from a dimly lit covered urban underpass up concrete stairs and along a sunny waterfront promenade lined with palm trees, benches, and futuristic buildings overlooking the ocean.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered concrete pedestrian underpass with ascending stairs

events.description: ascending concrete stairs toward the exit
approaching bright daylight visible at the top of the stairs

agents.ego_description: walking up concrete stairs in a dimly lit covered underpass toward daylight

notable_agents.action: descending the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: overhead concrete ceiling and walls of the covered walkway
wide concrete staircase ascending toward the exit
cyan and red neon tube lights mounted on the left wall
smooth concrete wall surface on the right side

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dimly lit covered concrete underpass with neon lighting. The camera ascends a wide concrete staircase, passing a pedestrian coming down, heading toward bright daylight visible at the exit above.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunny waterfront promenade with palm trees and ocean view

events.description: exiting covered underpass into bright open waterfront promenade
turning to look out over the water at the distant industrial skyline

agents.ego_description: walking along the sunny waterfront promenade, pausing to observe the ocean view and distant cityscape

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the right side of the promenade
metal safety railing along the edge of the waterfront
calm ocean water with distant industrial structures visible on the horizon
blue food vendor cart with colorful umbrella
tall modern building with dark glass facade and Marquess signage
metal and wood benches facing the water
hazy distant cityscape with industrial towers and skyscrapers across the water

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into bright sunlight, the scene opens onto a wide waterfront promenade lined with palm trees. The camera passes a food cart and benches, turning to look out over the calm ocean toward a distant industrial skyline before continuing along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban waterfront walkway with modern commercial buildings

events.description: turning from water view to continue walking along the promenade
passing colorful commercial kiosk and vending machines

agents.ego_description: continuing along the waterfront promenade past modern buildings and commercial structures

entered.detail: green and yellow commercial structure with signage
futuristic vending machine with illuminated display
overhead covered structure extending over part of the walkway
raised planters with dry grasses and small palm plants

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the promenade with the modern glass building now prominent on the left. Passing commercial kiosks and vending machines, the walkway features decorative planters and benches. The waterfront railing remains visible to the right while the path leads toward more dense urban structures ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit urban underpass into the bright, open expanse of a sunny waterfront promenade. It begins by ascending a wide concrete staircase under neon lights, passing a pedestrian while moving toward the glare of daylight at the exit. As the camera emerges from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a sun-drenched plaza lined with palm trees, where the view briefly shifts toward a calm ocean and a distant industrial skyline. The movement then continues along the path, passing food carts and commercial kiosks as a modern glass building becomes prominent on the left. Finally, the camera glides past decorative planters and benches, following the waterfront railing toward a cluster of dense urban structures ahead.
